SuperFAISS code at tag v3.0 (commit 712484a) — channel-capable scratch banks (channel table fixed at Create, append-time per-channel Cosine sub-norms, channel-aware Freeze, per-channel recall audit, scratch archive v3 presence-flags byte) and channel-scoped analytics (CentroidDistance/MeanNN/MaxNN/Spread CrossDeviceChannel; Cosine recomputes the sub-range sqrt for a bit-exact double reference; Poirot #1 DAZ-safe sub-norm decode) on the v2.5 analytics base. Reference docs (README.md, docs/API.md, docs/INTEGRATION.md, docs/DETERMINISM.md, docs/FORMAT.md) synced from the same v3.0 tag.
